main_status_idle: Tap the mic button and speak
suffix_desc: Added to the end when sending to clipboard
mic_mode_desc:
Snap: snap to left/right
Float: drag freely on screen
recog_mode_desc: Auto-stop: stops after each utterance. Continuous: auto-restarts after sending (hands-free).
history_storage_desc: Local: saved on this device only. Server(JSON): shared via JSON file. Server(DB): shared via database.
history_del_confirm_desc: Show a confirmation dialog when tapping the 🗑 button.
history_clear_desc: Delete all history saved on this device.
clipboard_auto_desc: Automatically pastes clipboard content when returning to the browser after copying in another app. Android Chrome only.
status_idle: Tap the mic button and speak
result_send_ok: ✅ Copied to clipboard! Press Ctrl+V to paste.
error_no_speech_api: This browser does not support Web Speech API. Please use Android Chrome.
error_clipboard_unsupported: This browser does not support clipboard monitoring.
error_clipboard_permission: Clipboard permission denied. Please check your browser settings.
